title: Carrier Bank Transfers
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Deposit > 0 THEN Deposit ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalDeposited, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Withdraw > 0 THEN Withdraw ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalWithdrawn FROM CarrierFinance WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {totalDeposited} Cr deposited vs. {totalWithdrawn} Cr withdrawn from the carrier bank during the report period. The carrier bank is where fleet finances live — the balance between deposits and withdrawals reveals whether your carrier is self-sustaining through trade operations or quietly bleeding maintenance credits every week.
details.help: CarrierFinance tracks carrier account movements. totalDeposited drives the title as the inflow headline. The difference from withdrawals shows net financial health.

tagLines: Fleet carrier bank transaction log compiled. Carrier account net position calculated for the report period.
The carrier maintenance bill arrives every week. What you deposited either covered it or it didn't.
Carrier finances are different from personal finances. The overheads are enormous. The margin can still be positive.
